subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Its contents were a manifest proof of thy steadfastness in the Cause of the resplendent Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضامین دلیل جلیل بر ثبوت بر امر نور مبین بود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution
